title: Dirty Oil Flows From Ag
summary:
Main
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 12, 20 March, 2025
In recent months, the global oil market has experienced notable shifts, particularly in the dynamics of dirty tanker flows from the Arabian Gulf (AG) to both Europe and the Far East/India. These changes are intricately linked to fluctuations in crude oil prices and projections of a tightening global oil supply. Dirty Tanker Flows: AG to Far East/India vs.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 12, 20 March, 2025
In recent months, the global oil market has experienced notable shifts, particularly in the dynamics of dirty tanker flows from the Arabian Gulf (AG) to both Europe and the Far East/India. These changes are intricately linked to fluctuations in crude oil prices and projections of a tightening global oil supply.
